methodologie.header_desc: Short, readable metrics based on documented sources.

water.title: Water preserved
water.desc: A cigarette butt can contaminate 500 to 1000 liters of water. We keep the lower bound to stay conservative.

co2.title: Emissions avoided
co2.desc: The calculation uses the ADEME factor to estimate emissions avoided through collection and controlled treatment.

surface.title: Action area
surface.desc: This index combines collected weight and time spent to read how intense an action is.

map.title: Map pollution index
map.formula: Separate scores: waste = [Weight/volunteer] ÷ [Waste ref] × 100; butts = [Butts/volunteer] ÷ [Butts ref] × 100.
map.desc: Dynamic per-volunteer references. The map uses the highest score for color. A stronger new action becomes the new reference. The detailed score loads when an action is opened.
map.source: SOURCE: CleanMyMap v1 field calibration algorithm.

roi.title: Street-cleaning savings
roi.desc: This proxy estimates the cost avoided for municipal services from the weight collected.
roi.source: SOURCE: Estimate based on average urban cleanliness costs (Observed average: €1500 / ton).

learnHub.header_desc: The starting point acts as an index and resume point: pick up the last step, then reopen the four dedicated pages without duplicating their content. Methodology stays separate.

enjeux.title: Why act now
enjeux.desc: Every minute, a new load of plastic reaches natural environments. We make this pollution visible to trigger action.

usage.step1_desc: Report a pollution point from the field.
usage.step2_desc: Collect waste and document the result.
usage.step3_desc: Submit the action to turn effort into measured impact.
usage.step4_desc: Review your statistics and impact certificate.

magnitude.title: Short calculations to understand fast
magnitude.desc: A few visible proxies to estimate impact in one minute, then a direct link to the methodology page for the full proof.
magnitude.note: These references are decision proxies. The methodology page keeps the full proof.

water.title: Butts and water
water.subtitle: Read a small gesture at scale

waste.title: Waste and CO2
waste.subtitle: See the impact of a collected volume

dashboard.objective_v2: Guide operational prioritization with a short decision summary, then targeted analytics without duplicating Compare, Climate, and Reports.
dashboard.section1_desc: Actionable short-term reading: impact, quality, coverage, mobilization, moderation delay.
dashboard.section2_desc: Service status and verification of sensitive executions.
dashboard.section3_desc: Quick action declaration directly from the landing page.
dashboard.trace_good: medium to high depending on available metrics
dashboard.trace_source: Sources: validated actions, pilotage overview module, N/N-1 derived metrics.
dashboard.trace_method: Method: absolute and relative deltas over a 30-day window. Scope: overview cockpit.
dashboard.desc_v1: Decision management focused on field impact, tracking, and data reliability.

panel.subtitle: Two badge families that update automatically based on your contributions.

modal.claimHint: Your level updates automatically when you submit an action. This button lets you acknowledge your progress.
